title: paractaenum refractum
intro: Paractaenum refractum, a lesser-known plant species, is a type of shrub or small tree, commonly referred to as a variety of the genus Paractaenum. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Paractaenum refractum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Paractaenum refractum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent.
